more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Harare Businessmen Arrested Over US$500 000 Hawala Forex Scheme
more.description: CID Operation Iron Net Targets Alleged Hawala Currency Dealers Two Harare cellphone dealers have appeared in court after being accused of running an alleged US$500 000 (approximately R9.2 million) Hawala-style foreign currency operation linked to cellphone imports from Dubai without approval from the Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe (RBZ). The businessmen, identified as Blessing Chinhanga and [...] The post Harare Businessmen Arrested Over US$500 000 Hawala Forex Scheme appeared first on iHarare News .

more.title: Horror N1 Bus Crash In Limpopo Kills Malawian Travellers
more.description: Several Malawians Killed In Limpopo Bus Crash Several Malawians have reportedly died after a bus travelling from Gauteng to Malawi was involved in a horrific crash along the N1 highway near the Witvlag area in Limpopo Province, South Africa, on Thursday evening. Rescue teams were still attending to the scene late into the night as [...] The post Horror N1 Bus Crash In Limpopo Kills Malawian Travellers appeared first on iHarare News .

more.title: Russia, SADC Extend Military and Technical Cooperation Agreement to 2028
more.description: JOHANNESBURG – Russia and the Southern African Development Community have extended their long-standing military and technical cooperation agreements to 2028, signalling deepening strategic ties between Moscow and the Southern African regional bloc amid growing geopolitical competition on the African continent. The renewed partnership, first formalised in 2018, now moves into what officials described as a [...] The post Russia, SADC Extend Military and Technical Cooperation Agreement to 2028 appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: Marking a century | David Attenborough to celebrate 100th birthday
more.description: David Attenborough, a leading voice on climate change and biodiversity loss whose landmark documentaries transformed popular understanding of the natural world for a global audience, marks his 100th birthday on Friday. Attenborough’s natural history series, such as “Life on Earth”, in which he had a famous encounter with mountain gorillas in Rwanda, have brought the [...] The post Marking a century | David Attenborough to celebrate 100th birthday appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: Grounded jet, frozen accounts: Chivayo seeks to nullify marriage
more.description: HARARE – Businessman Wicknell Chivayo has launched an urgent High Court bid to have his estranged wife Sonja Madzikanda’s divorce case dismissed, arguing that their customary union was already terminated in 2024 and that the litigation is now crippling his business empire after South African courts froze assets linked to him. The application is the [...] The post Grounded jet, frozen accounts: Chivayo seeks to nullify marriage appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: Afdis income jumps 51pc as firm rides on demand and volume surge
more.description: African Distillers Limited (Afdis) total income jumped 51 percent to US$7.7 million, on the back of a 56 percent jump in revenue during the year to March 31, 2026. The beverage maker benefited from firm consumer demand, reduced pressure from the illicit alcohol trade and improved product availability. Revenue climbed from US$45,660 million to US$93.2 [...] The post Afdis income jumps 51pc as firm rides on demand and volume surge appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: So should Zimbabweans be proud that our fuel is second, and not the most expensive in Africa, Prof. Mthuli?
more.description: Source: So should Zimbabweans be proud that our fuel is second, and not the most expensive in Africa, Prof. Mthuli? At times, I wonder if we are still sane in Zimbabwe.
